questions.question: Which state/UT is the host of 37th National Games in 2023?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the 37th edition of the National Games in Panaji, Goa. More than 10,000 athletes will compete in the event in over 43 sports disciplines across 28 venues. The National Games are being held in Goa for the very first time.

questions.question: Which country hosted the ‘International Travel Exhibitions- Asia’?
questions.explanation: India’s Ministry of Tourism participates in International Travel Exhibitions Asia, Singapore. This year has been declared as the Visit India Year 2023 to position India as a preferred destination at the targeted potential international markets. The aim is to showcase the tourism products and series of transformative experiences for travellers to India under the theme ‘Incredible India! Visit India Year 2023’.

questions.question: Robert Fico, who was seen in the news, is the Prime Minister of which country?
questions.explanation: Slovakia’s new populist Prime Minister Robert Fico announced halt of military aid to Ukraine. Slovakia had pledged 680 million euros in total government support to Ukraine through July 2023. The Central European country of 5.4 million people was notably the first NATO nation to deliver fighter jets to its war-torn neighbour.

questions.question: ‘Dragonfly rotorcraft lander’ is associated with which country?
questions.explanation: NASA’s Dragonfly rotorcraft lander will be employed for a mission to investigate Saturn’s moon, Titan, which is known for its dense atmosphere and low gravity, making it an ideal place for aerial exploration. Dragonfly, a nuclear-powered drone roughly the size of a car, has been specifically designed by NASA for the purpose of studying the intricate chemistry that serves as the foundation for life.

questions.question: As per a recent study, which Indian state has the highest cancer incidence rate in the country?
questions.explanation: In spite of being the country’s second least populated State, Mizoram exhibits the highest incidence rate of cancer in India. The latest evidence from an 18-year trend study notes a consistent rise in cancer incidence and mortality in Mizoram, with stomach cancer emerging as the primary cause of cancer-related deaths among men, while lung cancer is the primary cause of deaths among women.

questions.question: Which company launched India’s inaugural satellite-based gigabit broadband service?
questions.explanation: Reliance Jio Infocomm Limited introduced JioSpaceFiber, India’s inaugural satellite-based gigabit broadband service. The aim is to provide high-speed internet connectivity to remote regions of India that were previously underserved or inaccessible.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry organised the ‘Dark Patterns Buster Hackathon 2023’?

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution

questions.explanation: Recently, the Central government inaugurated the ‘Dark Patterns Buster Hackathon 2023,’ with the objective of creating an innovative application or software-based solution capable of identifying dark patterns on e-commerce platforms. This hackathon is being conducted in partnership with the Department of Consumer Affairs (DoCA) and IIT-(BHU).

questions.question: ‘Skilled Online Games Institute (SOGI)’ is associated with which country?
questions.explanation: To promote responsible gaming, to combat negative perceptions and address misinformation surrounding gaming, several online gaming companies have collaborated to establish the Skilled Online Games Institute (SOGI). The institute boasts a board comprising members from leading gaming companies and enjoys support from the All-India Gaming Federation (AIGF) and the eGamers and Players Welfare Association (EPWA).

questions.question: ‘Malvinoxhosan biota’, which was seen in the news, is a group of_?
questions.explanation: The Malvinoxhosan biota, an ancient group of aquatic creatures, is thought to have vanished from Gondwana over a span of five million years. A recent study suggests that climate change played a significant role in their extinction. According to the study, a substantial drop in sea levels caused by climate change resulted in the disappearance of this group of marine animals.

questions.question: Which element, rarer than Platinum, has been discovered using NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope (JWST)?
questions.explanation: Astronomers made a remarkable discovery of tellurium, an element even rarer than platinum on Earth, located approximately 1 billion light-years away. This discovery was made possible through observations conducted using NASA’s advanced James Webb Space Telescope (JWST).
